PowerShell($session = $null; $headers = @{ "Accept" = "application/json, text/event-stream"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"0.1"}}}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8766/mcp" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $sid = $resp.Headers["mcp-session-id"]; Write-Host "Session: $sid"; $headers2 = @{ "Accept" = "application/json, text/event-stream"; "Content-Type" = "application/json"; "mcp-session-id" = $sid }; $body2 = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}'; $resp2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8766/mcp" -Method POST -Headers $headers2 -Body $body2 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host $resp2.Content)

PowerShell($headers = @{ "Accept" = "application/json, text/event-stream"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; $body = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"0.1"}}}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8766/mcp" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $sid = $resp.Headers["mcp-session-id"]; $headers["mcp-session-id"] = $sid; $body2 = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_files","arguments":{"limit":5}}}'; $resp2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8766/mcp" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body2 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host $resp2.Content)
